bench_setup.notes: DAC1_OUT1 (PA4) internal readback via ADC2_IN17. No external wiring required — internal routing on G431. HIGH: DHR12R1=3723 → ADC>2500; LOW: DHR12R1=372 → ADC<1000. PA4 in analog mode. Error codes: 0xE001=ADC timeout, 0xE002=HIGH value too low (DAC/ADC not connected), 0xE003=LOW value too high.

peripheral_signals.notes: DAC1 CH1 output. Internally routed to ADC2_IN17. PA4 configured as analog. LA probe P0.2 on PA4 is high-impedance — no conflict.
